Post Content:
A trillion-dollar AI market is coming — the real question is whether your organization will be ready to claim its share.

The Synozur 2026 AI Report reveals a striking gap: most organizations score around 260 out of 500 on AI maturity. That means they've moved past experimenting, but they're nowhere close to operating AI at scale. In a market projected to approach a trillion dollars by 2030, that middle-ground position is a risky place to sit still.

The latest episode of Polaris Pulse breaks down exactly where organizations stand on the AI maturity curve, what the global market growth actually means for business leaders, and three forward-looking predictions that could shape your strategy for the year ahead.

The window to move from "exploring" to "leading" is narrowing. Understanding where you are on the maturity curve — and what it takes to close the gap — is no longer optional. It's the difference between capturing value and watching others do it. #AIMaturityCurve #AIReadiness #PolarisPulse #TrillionDollarAI #Synozur2026AIReport
